```{=html}
<div>                        <script>window.PlotlyConfig = {MathJaxConfig: 'local'};</script>
        <script charset="utf-8" src="https://cdn.plot.ly/plotly-3.5.0.min.js" integrity="sha256-fHbNLP+GlIXN+efbQec78UkemUz3NJp7UmfGxC1tNxs=" crossorigin="anonymous"></script>                <div id="fig4-loglik-curve" class="plotly-graph-div" style="height:400px; width:100%;"></div>            <script>                window.PLOTLYENV=window.PLOTLYENV || {};                                if (document.getElementById("fig4-loglik-curve")) {                    Plotly.newPlot(                        "fig4-loglik-curve",                        [{"hovertemplate":"\u03bb = %{x:.2f}\u003cbr\u003elog L = %{y:.1f}\u003cextra\u003e\u003c\u002fextra\u003e","line":{"color":"#3B82F6","width":2.5},"mode":"lines","name":"log-likelihood","x":{"dtype":"f8","bdata":"AAAAAAAA4D\u002f5F6wlfM3gP\u002fIvWEv4muE\u002f7EcEcXRo4j\u002flX7CW8DXjP953XLxsA+Q\u002f148I4ujQ5D\u002fQp7QHZZ7lP8m\u002fYC3ha+Y\u002fwtcMU1055z+877h42QboP7QHZZ5V1Og\u002frh8RxNGh6T+nN73pTW\u002fqP6BPaQ\u002fKPOs\u002fmmcVNUYK7D+Sf8FawtfsP4yXbYA+pe0\u002fha8Zprpy7j9+x8XLNkDvP7zvuHjZBvA\u002fuPuOi5dt8D+0B2WeVdTwP7ITO7ETO\u002fE\u002frh8RxNGh8T+qK+fWjwjyP6c3velNb\u002fI\u002fpEOT\u002fAvW8j+gT2kPyjzzP51bPyKIo\u002fM\u002fmmcVNUYK9D+Wc+tHBHH0P5J\u002fwVrC1\u002fQ\u002fj4uXbYA+9T+Ml22APqX1P4ijQ5P8C\u002fY\u002fha8Zprpy9j+Cu++4eNn2P37Hxcs2QPc\u002fetOb3vSm9z9333Hxsg34P3TrRwRxdPg\u002fcPcdFy\u002fb+D9tA\u002fQp7UH5P2kPyjyrqPk\u002fZhugT2kP+j9jJ3ZiJ3b6P18zTHXl3Po\u002fXD8iiKND+z9YS\u002fiaYar7P1VXzq0fEfw\u002fUWOkwN13\u002fD9Ob3rTm978P0t7UOZZRf0\u002fR4cm+Res\u002fT9Ek\u002fwL1hL+P0Cf0h6Uef4\u002fPauoMVLg\u002fj86t35EEEf\u002fPzbDVFfOrf8\u002fmmcVNUYKAECYbYA+pT0AQJZz60cEcQBAlHlWUWOkAECSf8FawtcAQJGFLGQhCwFAj4uXbYA+AUCOkQJ333EBQIyXbYA+pQFAip3YiZ3YAUCIo0OT\u002fAsCQIaprpxbPwJAha8ZprpyAkCDtYSvGaYCQIK777h42QJAgMFawtcMA0B+x8XLNkADQHzNMNWVcwNAetOb3vSmA0B52QboU9oDQHffcfGyDQRAdeXc+hFBBEB060cEcXQEQHLxsg3QpwRAcPcdFy\u002fbBEBv\u002fYggjg4FQG0D9CntQQVAawlfM0x1BUBpD8o8q6gFQGgVNUYK3AVAZhugT2kPBkBkIQtZyEIGQGMndmIndgZAYS3ha4apBkBfM0x15dwGQF05t35EEAdAXD8iiKNDB0BaRY2RAncHQFhL+JphqgdAV1FjpMDdB0BVV86tHxEIQFNdObd+RAhAUWOkwN13CEBQaQ\u002fKPKsIQE5vetOb3ghATHXl3PoRCUBLe1DmWUUJQEmBu++4eAlAR4cm+ResCUBGjZECd98JQEST\u002fAvWEgpAQplnFTVGCkBAn9IelHkKQD+lPSjzrApAPauoMVLgCkA7sRM7sRMLQDq3fkQQRwtAOL3pTW96C0A2w1RXzq0LQDTJv2At4QtAM88qaowUDEAx1ZVz60cMQC\u002fbAH1KewxALuFrhqmuDEAs59aPCOIMQCrtQZlnFQ1AKPOsosZIDUAn+ResJXwNQCX\u002fgrWErw1AIwXuvuPiDUAiC1nIQhYOQCARxNGhSQ5AHhcv2wB9DkAcHZrkX7AOQBsjBe6+4w5AGSlw9x0XD0AXL9sAfUoPQBY1RgrcfQ9AFDuxEzuxD0ASQRwdmuQPQIijQ5P8CxBAiCb5F6wlEECGqa6cWz8QQIYsZCELWRBAha8ZprpyEECEMs8qaowQQIO1hK8ZphBAgjg6NMm\u002fEECCu++4eNkQQIA+pT0o8xBAgMFawtcMEUB\u002fRBBHhyYRQH7Hxcs2QBFAfUp7UOZZEUB8zTDVlXMRQHxQ5llFjRFAetOb3vSmEUB6VlFjpMARQHnZBuhT2hFAeFy8bAP0EUB333Hxsg0SQHZiJ3ZiJxJAdeXc+hFBEkB1aJJ\u002fwVoSQHTrRwRxdBJAc279iCCOEkBy8bIN0KcSQHF0aJJ\u002fwRJAcPcdFy\u002fbEkBvetOb3vQSQG\u002f9iCCODhNAboA+pT0oE0BtA\u002fQp7UETQGyGqa6cWxNAawlfM0x1E0BqjBS4+44TQGkPyjyrqBNAaZJ\u002fwVrCE0BoFTVGCtwTQGeY6sq59RNAZhugT2kPFEBlnlXUGCkUQGQhC1nIQhRAY6TA3XdcFEBjJ3ZiJ3YUQGKqK+fWjxRAYS3ha4apFEBgsJbwNcMUQF8zTHXl3BRAXrYB+pT2FEBdObd+RBAVQF28bAP0KRVAXD8iiKNDFUBbwtcMU10VQFpFjZECdxVAWchCFrKQFUBYS\u002fiaYaoVQFfOrR8RxBVAV1FjpMDdFUBW1BgpcPcVQFVXzq0fERZAVNqDMs8qFkBTXTm3fkQWQFLg7jsuXhZAUWOkwN13FkBR5llFjZEWQFBpD8o8qxZAT+zETuzEFkBOb3rTm94WQE3yL1hL+BZATHXl3PoRF0BL+JphqisXQEt7UOZZRRdASv4FawlfF0BJgbvvuHgXQEgEcXRokhdAR4cm+ResF0BGCtx9x8UXQEaNkQJ33xdARRBHhyb5F0BEk\u002fwL1hIYQEMWspCFLBhAQplnFTVGGEBBHB2a5F8YQECf0h6UeRhAQCKIo0OTGEA\u002fpT0o86wYQD4o86yixhhAPauoMVLgGEA8Ll62AfoYQDuxEzuxExlAOjTJv2AtGUA6t35EEEcZQDk6NMm\u002fYBlAOL3pTW96GUA3QJ\u002fSHpQZQDbDVFfOrRlANUYK3H3HGUA0yb9gLeEZQDRMdeXc+hlAM88qaowUGkAyUuDuOy4aQDHVlXPrRxpAMFhL+JphGkAv2wB9SnsaQC5etgH6lBpALuFrhqmuGkAtZCELWcgaQCzn1o8I4hpAK2qMFLj7GkAq7UGZZxUbQClw9x0XLxtAKPOsosZIG0AodmIndmIbQCf5F6wlfBtAJnzNMNWVG0Al\u002f4K1hK8bQCSCODo0yRtAIwXuvuPiG0AiiKNDk\u002fwbQCILWchCFhxAIY4OTfIvHEAgEcTRoUkcQB+UeVZRYxxAHhcv2wB9HEAdmuRfsJYcQBwdmuRfsBxAHKBPaQ\u002fKHEAbIwXuvuMcQBqmunJu\u002fRxAGSlw9x0XHUAYrCV8zTAdQBcv2wB9Sh1AFrKQhSxkHUAWNUYK3H0dQBW4+46Llx1AFDuxEzuxHUATvmaY6sodQBJBHB2a5B1AEcTRoUn+HUAQR4cm+RceQBDKPKuoMR5AD03yL1hLHkAO0Ke0B2UeQA1TXTm3fh5ADNYSvmaYHkALWchCFrIeQArcfcfFyx5ACl8zTHXlHkAJ4ujQJP8eQAhlnlXUGB9AB+hT2oMyH0AGawlfM0wfQAXuvuPiZR9ABHF0aJJ\u002fH0AE9CntQZkfQAN333Hxsh9AAvqU9qDMH0ABfUp7UOYfQAAAAAAAACBA"},"y":{"dtype":"f8","bdata":"dK+fqvTOwsA3ARgqf1rCwKq4NvNZ7MHAWufw2fSDwcA+UmAq0iDBwL7bH6KDwsDAZE4TAqhowMC1RfkV6RLAwAa5\u002fC\u002f0gb\u002fAh8TGuSzlvsBVyNBzAE++wHSuLTIAv73AYOAeZsc0vcAk4dPO+q+8wHxIU1xHMLzAqk3OO2G1u8BEnVoGAz+7wDKFZwztzLrA3fpSueReusB87VkLtPS5wGakyhwpjrnAxE3puxUrucDzu2UPT8u4wJhBm0WtbrjAo\u002focTQsVuMAS+EyVRr63wAxT7tU+arfA9S\\u002f3hfWsMCQX2MTV7SwwMN\u002f6UJ\u002fk7DATE+Nj4pzsMAe4Y1Tc1SwwBzsbR40NrDAYBhesscYsMBr6Z0DUvivwMOFT1qmwK\u002fAlgg\u002fAYOKr8BvzGvk3lWvwJK7kz+xIq\u002fAy9+XmvHwrsDCkxTGl8CuwKvoKdibka7AeBZxKfZjrsArChxSnzeuwKddPCeQDK7ACjgvuMHircB0xCtMLbqtwC8Y8l\u002fMkq3AEImYo5hsrcDWmHX4i0etwCe8JG+gI63AQmKkRdAArcAPv4vlFd+swEjzVuJrvqzAaUbI98yerMCuPF0INICswKFn1hucYqzA\u002fuLQXQBGrMBDgXAcXCqswHK7GceqD6zA5IY67ef1q8DaQSE9D92rwIz04IIcxavA2DBCpwuuq8A65b+u2JerwDSDj7h\u002fgqvA3uGz\u002ffxtq8B8TxrQTFqrwIJMwZlrR6vA8HLo21U1q8AUFEkuCCSrwE4dVz5\u002fE6vActuJzrcDq8DWOay1rvSqwAQgNN5g5qrAMJagRcvYqsBeXd776suqwPassiK9v6rAjssr7T60qsD6PBefbamqwGRDfYxGn6rAjnQhGceVqsAWKAi47IyqwGqGAOu0hKrAHAMzQh19qsAuELRbI3aqwHDaGuPEb6rAXOEbkf9pqsB+Pycr0WSqwIh6CoM3YKrAwrOVdjBcqsCOFETvuViqwFJT5+HRVarAji9WTnZTqsCexR0\u002fpVGqwICbNclcUKrAQEq2C5tPqsBQqJIvXk+qwARbU2ekT6rABrbU7mtQqsBs0QYLs1GqwHS\u002frwl4U6rAoswvQblVqsCotUcQdViqwEa\u002f4N2pW6rAup3WGFZfqsB6GcM3eGOqwJhgy7gOaKrA6vNuIRhtqsD6IFj+knKqwE75LeN9eKrAFLlnatd+qsBUjyE1noWqwOC68urQjKrAKO\u002fEOW6UqsA89azVdJyqwHB9xHjjpKrAnhYF47itqsCQQCTa87aqwGyPcCmTwKrAetavoZXKqsAoUf4Y+tSqwATBrmq\u002f36rAkngrd+TqqsCQStgjaPaqwOBV9VpJAqvAbqaCC4cOq8AYpCQpIBurwDJICawTKKvAlhPOkGA1q8AMvmbYBUOrwKiZBIgCUavAgqP+qFVfq8CUPLpI\u002fm2rwOCElHj7fKvAwlPMTUyMq8CGyGzh75urwNptOFDlq6vA\u002fOuUuiu8q8CYRHdEwsyrwIKUUBWo3avAgFb7V9zuq8B4I6k6XgCswCLs0O4sEqzALqgdqUckrMB0d12hrTaswKwxcRJeSazATmE8OlhcrMAsppVZm2+swOR8N7Qmg6zAAmixkPmWrMDOd1k4E6uswCguPvdyv6zAiLsYHBjUrMCukj\u002f4AemswDJQmd8v\u002fqzA7POPKKETrcBIaQQsVSmtwNJcQkVLP63ARlz00YJVrcBIPxgy+2utwJLW88ezgq3Att8J+KuZrcBgOw8p47CtwFhk4MNYyK3AWiV3MwzgrcAOjODk\u002fPetwJgXM0cqEK7AsiCFy5MorsA+euPkOEGuwGJISAgZWq7AzgySrDNzrsDi5npKiIyuwBYGkFwWpq7AWk0pX92\u002frsA2JmHQ3NmuwG6CDDAU9K7Ajgqz\u002f4IOr8C6eIfCKCmvwD4eYP0ERK\u002fA1pKvNhdfr8CWjH32XnqvwGLfX8bbla\u002fACqNzMY2xr8DiflbEcs2vwP4ZIA2M6a\u002fAk9etTewCsMC54QAALBGwwHP\u002fuOaEH7DAB5O2y\u002fYtsMDfmYd5gTywwDfJZLskS7DA97kuXeBZsMCTI2srtGiwwH0lQvOfd7DAyZ57gqOGsMCVk3ynvpWwwCegRDHxpLDAF3lr7zq0sMBheB6ym8OwwBU3HkoT07DANzO8iKHisMC3gdg\u002fRvKwwOmL30EBArHAndjHYdIRscAz4A9zuSGxwKPru0m2MbHAJf5TushBscAryeGZ8FGxwJeq7r0tYrHAw7SB\u002fH9yscBBwB0s54KxwAOHvyNjk7HA2cjbuvOjscDTeF3JmLSxwJHzoydSxbHAJz6Brh\u002fWscBzTTg3AeexwKdVe5v297HA5SFqtf8IssDTc5BfHBqywK9q5HRMK7LAH\u002fLE0I88ssA5OPhO5k2ywN0qqstPX7LA\u002f\u002ftqI8xwssDrrC0zW4KywDegRtj8k7LAXTJq8LClssC3WKtZd7eywOFGevJPybLAORqjmTrbssBxi0wuN+2ywA+m9o9F\u002f7LAr4V5nmURs8ALGQQ6lyOzwGfqGkPaNbPAl+2Wmi5Is8AvU6QhlFqzwCVhwbkKbbPAQVC9RJJ\u002fs8DJLrekKpKzwP3HHLzTpLPAYZCpbY23s8CxlmWcV8qzwHd5pCsy3bPAL2EE\u002fxzws8DB\u002fmz6FwO0wFmODgIjFrTAdd5g+j0ptMA7WyLIaDy0wKsdV1CjT7TA9f5HeO1itMDDr4ElR3a0wC\u002fT0z2wibTApR1QpyidtMBRd0lIsLC0wE8iUwdHxLTAR+Q\u002fy+zXtMCVMyF7oeu0wNFnRv5k\u002f7TAre07PDcTtcAlfsocGCe1wN1Y9ocHO7XAn4H+ZQVPtcAFAVyfEWO1wBUowRwsd7XA69YYx1SLtcA9xoWHi5+1wNHTYUfQs7XA"},"type":"scatter"}],                        {"template":{"data":{"histogram2dcontour":[{"type":"histogram2dcontour","colorbar":{"outlinewidth":0,"ticks":""},"colorscale":[[0.0,"#0d0887"],[0.1111111111111111,"#46039f"],[0.2222222222222222,"#7201a8"],[0.3333333333333333,"#9c179e"],[0.4444444444444444,"#bd3786"],[0.5555555555555556,"#d8576b"],[0.6666666666666666,"#ed7953"],[0.7777777777777778,"#fb9f3a"],[0.8888888888888888,"#fdca26"],[1.0,"#f0f921"]]}],"choropleth":[{"type":"choropleth","colorbar":{"outlinewidth":0,"ticks":""}}],"histogram2d":[{"type":"histogram2d","colorbar":{"outlinewidth":0,"ticks":""},"colorscale":[[0.0,"#0d0887"],[0.1111111111111111,"#46039f"],[0.2222222222222222,"#7201a8"],[0.3333333333333333,"#9c179e"],[0.4444444444444444,"#bd3786"],[0.5555555555555556,"#d8576b"],[0.6666666666666666,"#ed7953"],[0.7777777777777778,"#fb9f3a"],[0.8888888888888888,"#fdca26"],[1.0,"#f0f921"]]}],"heatmap":[{"type":"heatmap","colorbar":{"outlinewidth":0,"ticks":""},"colorscale":[[0.0,"#0d0887"],[0.1111111111111111,"#46039f"],[0.2222222222222222,"#7201a8"],[0.3333333333333333,"#9c179e"],[0.4444444444444444,"#bd3786"],[0.5555555555555556,"#d8576b"],[0.6666666666666666,"#ed7953"],[0.7777777777777778,"#fb9f3a"],[0.8888888888888888,"#fdca26"],[1.0,"#f0f921"]]}],"contourcarpet":[{"type":"contourcarpet","colorbar":{"outlinewidth":0,"ticks":""}}],"contour":[{"type":"contour","colorbar":{"outlinewidth":0,"ticks":""},"colorscale":[[0.0,"#0d0887"],[0.1111111111111111,"#46039f"],[0.2222222222222222,"#7201a8"],[0.3333333333333333,"#9c179e"],[0.4444444444444444,"#bd3786"],[0.5555555555555556,"#d8576b"],[0.6666666666666666,"#ed7953"],[0.7777777777777778,"#fb9f3a"],[0.8888888888888888,"#fdca26"],[1.0,"#f0f921"]]}],"surface":[{"type":"surface","colorbar":{"outlinewidth":0,"ticks":""},"colorscale":[[0.0,"#0d0887"],[0.1111111111111111,"#46039f"],[0.2222222222222222,"#7201a8"],[0.3333333333333333,"#9c179e"],[0.4444444444444444,"#bd3786"],[0.5555555555555556,"#d8576b"],[0.6666666666666666,"#ed7953"],[0.7777777777777778,"#fb9f3a"],[0.8888888888888888,"#fdca26"],[1.0,"#f0f921"]]}],"mesh3d":[{"type":"mesh3d","colorbar":{"outlinewidth":0,"ticks":""}}],"scatter":[{"fillpattern":{"fillmode":"overlay","size":10,"solidity":0.2},"type":"scatter"}],"parcoords":[{"type":"parcoords","line":{"colorbar":{"outlinewidth":0,"ticks":""}}}],"scatterpolargl":[{"type":"scatterpolargl","marker":{"colorbar":{"outlinewidth":0,"ticks":""}}}],"bar":[{"error_x":{"color":"#2a3f5f"},"error_y":{"color":"#2a3f5f"},"marker":{"line":{"color":"#E5ECF6","width":0.5},"pattern":{"fillmode":"overlay","size":10,"solidity":0.2}},"type":"bar"}],"scattergeo":[{"type":"scattergeo","marker":{"colorbar":{"outlinewidth":0,"ticks":""}}}],"scatterpolar":[{"type":"scatterpolar","marker":{"colorbar":{"outlinewidth":0,"ticks":""}}}],"histogram":[{"marker":{"pattern":{"fillmode":"overlay","size":10,"solidity":0.2}},"type":"histogram"}],"scattergl":[{"type":"scattergl","marker":{"colorbar":{"outlinewidth":0,"ticks":""}}}],"scatter3d":[{"type":"scatter3d","line":{"colorbar":{"outlinewidth":0,"ticks":""}},"marker":{"colorbar":{"outlinewidth":0,"ticks":""}}}],"scattermap":[{"type":"scattermap","marker":{"colorbar":{"outlinewidth":0,"ticks":""}}}],"scattermapbox":[{"type":"scattermapbox","marker":{"colorbar":{"outlinewidth":0,"ticks":""}}}],"scatterternary":[{"type":"scatterternary","marker":{"colorbar":{"outlinewidth":0,"ticks":""}}}],"scattercarpet":[{"type":"scattercarpet","marker":{"colorbar":{"outlinewidth":0,"ticks":""}}}],"carpet":[{"aaxis":{"endlinecolor":"#2a3f5f","gridcolor":"white","linecolor":"white","minorgridcolor":"white","startlinecolor":"#2a3f5f"},"baxis":{"endlinecolor":"#2a3f5f","gridcolor":"white","linecolor":"white","minorgridcolor":"white","startlinecolor":"#2a3f5f"},"type":"carpet"}],"table":[{"cells":{"fill":{"color":"#EBF0F8"},"line":{"color":"white"}},"header":{"fill":{"color":"#C8D4E3"},"line":{"color":"white"}},"type":"table"}],"barpolar":[{"marker":{"line":{"color":"#E5ECF6","width":0.5},"pattern":{"fillmode":"overlay","size":10,"solidity":0.2}},"type":"barpolar"}],"pie":[{"automargin":true,"type":"pie"}]},"layout":{"autotypenumbers":"strict","colorway":["#636efa","#EF553B","#00cc96","#ab63fa","#FFA15A","#19d3f3","#FF6692","#B6E880","#FF97FF","#FECB52"],"font":{"color":"#2a3f5f"},"hovermode":"closest","hoverlabel":{"align":"left"},"paper_bgcolor":"white","plot_bgcolor":"#E5ECF6","polar":{"bgcolor":"#E5ECF6","angularaxis":{"gridcolor":"white","linecolor":"white","ticks":""},"radialaxis":{"gridcolor":"white","linecolor":"white","ticks":""}},"ternary":{"bgcolor":"#E5ECF6","aaxis":{"gridcolor":"white","linecolor":"white","ticks":""},"baxis":{"gridcolor":"white","linecolor":"white","ticks":""},"caxis":{"gridcolor":"white","linecolor":"white","ticks":""}},"coloraxis":{"colorbar":{"outlinewidth":0,"ticks":""}},"colorscale":{"sequential":[[0.0,"#0d0887"],[0.1111111111111111,"#46039f"],[0.2222222222222222,"#7201a8"],[0.3333333333333333,"#9c179e"],[0.4444444444444444,"#bd3786"],[0.5555555555555556,"#d8576b"],[0.6666666666666666,"#ed7953"],[0.7777777777777778,"#fb9f3a"],[0.8888888888888888,"#fdca26"],[1.0,"#f0f921"]],"sequentialminus":[[0.0,"#0d0887"],[0.1111111111111111,"#46039f"],[0.2222222222222222,"#7201a8"],[0.3333333333333333,"#9c179e"],[0.4444444444444444,"#bd3786"],[0.5555555555555556,"#d8576b"],[0.6666666666666666,"#ed7953"],[0.7777777777777778,"#fb9f3a"],[0.8888888888888888,"#fdca26"],[1.0,"#f0f921"]],"diverging":[[0,"#8e0152"],[0.1,"#c51b7d"],[0.2,"#de77ae"],[0.3,"#f1b6da"],[0.4,"#fde0ef"],[0.5,"#f7f7f7"],[0.6,"#e6f5d0"],[0.7,"#b8e186"],[0.8,"#7fbc41"],[0.9,"#4d9221"],[1,"#276419"]]},"xaxis":{"gridcolor":"white","linecolor":"white","ticks":"","title":{"standoff":15},"zerolinecolor":"white","automargin":true,"zerolinewidth":2},"yaxis":{"gridcolor":"white","linecolor":"white","ticks":"","title":{"standoff":15},"zerolinecolor":"white","automargin":true,"zerolinewidth":2},"scene":{"xaxis":{"backgroundcolor":"#E5ECF6","gridcolor":"white","linecolor":"white","showbackground":true,"ticks":"","zerolinecolor":"white","gridwidth":2},"yaxis":{"backgroundcolor":"#E5ECF6","gridcolor":"white","linecolor":"white","showbackground":true,"ticks":"","zerolinecolor":"white","gridwidth":2},"zaxis":{"backgroundcolor":"#E5ECF6","gridcolor":"white","linecolor":"white","showbackground":true,"ticks":"","zerolinecolor":"white","gridwidth":2}},"shapedefaults":{"line":{"color":"#2a3f5f"}},"annotationdefaults":{"arrowcolor":"#2a3f5f","arrowhead":0,"arrowwidth":1},"geo":{"bgcolor":"white","landcolor":"#E5ECF6","subunitcolor":"white","showland":true,"showlakes":true,"lakecolor":"white"},"title":{"x":0.05},"mapbox":{"style":"light"}}},"shapes":[{"line":{"color":"#A78BFA","dash":"dot","width":2},"type":"line","x0":3.6846666666666668,"x1":3.6846666666666668,"xref":"x","y0":0,"y1":1,"yref":"y domain"}],"annotations":[{"arrowcolor":"#A78BFA","arrowhead":2,"ax":70,"ay":-40,"font":{"color":"#A78BFA","size":12},"showarrow":true,"text":"MLE = \u0233 = 3.6847","x":3.6846666666666668,"y":-3367.683956702276}],"xaxis":{"title":{"text":"\u03bb (rate parameter)","font":{"color":"rgba(150,150,150,0.7)"}},"tickfont":{"color":"rgba(150,150,150,0.7)"},"showgrid":true,"gridcolor":"rgba(150,150,150,0.15)","zeroline":false,"linecolor":"rgba(150,150,150,0.7)"},"yaxis":{"title":{"text":"log-likelihood","font":{"color":"rgba(150,150,150,0.7)"}},"tickfont":{"color":"rgba(150,150,150,0.7)"},"showgrid":true,"gridcolor":"rgba(150,150,150,0.15)","zeroline":false,"linecolor":"rgba(150,150,150,0.7)"},"font":{"family":"Geist, system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif","size":13,"color":"#888"},"margin":{"t":30,"r":20,"b":50,"l":60},"legend":{"orientation":"h","yanchor":"bottom","y":1.02,"xanchor":"right","x":1,"bgcolor":"rgba(0,0,0,0)"},"hoverlabel":{"font":{"color":"#F0EEE8","family":"Geist"},"bgcolor":"#161614"},"paper_bgcolor":"rgba(0,0,0,0)","plot_bgcolor":"rgba(0,0,0,0)","height":400},                        {"displayModeBar": false, "responsive": true}                    )                };            </script>        </div>
```
